item.title: Vault
item.description: Intro Secrets—things that grant authentication or authorization Usernames, passwords, TLC certs, API tokens etc. Secret sprawl—secrets end up everywhere Source code, config, VCS etc.

item.title: Terraform
item.description: Core Infrastructure as Code (IAC) Commands Settings State Backends Providers Vault Provider Modules Variables Output Values Provisioners Debug Logs Types Resources Data Sources File and Workspace Information Dynamic Blocks Terraform Cloud Terraform Cloud Sentinel

item.title: GCP Services
item.description: Decision Trees GCP Decision Trees Fundamentals GCP Annotations Compute Compute Engine Kubernetes Engine (GKE) Anthos App Engine Cloud Run Cloud Functions VMware Engine GCP Compute Autoscaling Storage Local SSDs Persistent Disks Cloud Filestore Cloud Storage gsutil Databases Cloud SQL Cloud Spanner Cloud Bigtable Cloud Firestore Firebase Memorystore Datastream Networking External Networking Cloud Domains Cloud DNS Static IP Addresses Load Balancing Cloud CDN Cloud NAT Internal Networking VPCs Cloud Interconnect Cloud VPN Cloud Router Network Endpoint Groups APIs and Application Layer Cloud Endpoints API Gateway Big Data IoT Core Pub/Sub BigQuery Dataprep Dataproc Dataflow Cloud Composer AI/ML Vertex AI Security Cloud IAM GCP Resource Manager Cloud Identity Identity Aware Proxy Cloud Security Command Center Web Security Scanner Cloud Armor Event Threat Detection Cloud Data Loss Prevention Cloud KMS CMEK and CSEK Cloud HSM Cloud EKM Secret Manager Operations Cloud Monitoring Cloud Logging Cloud Debugger Cloud Trace Cloud Profiler Error Reporting CI/CD Cloud Build

item.title: Kubernetes
